summary: Created 4-phase implementation plan for module keyword migration of 155 Logics/ files. Phase 1 removes private from 105 def/abbrev declarations (mechanical sed). Phases 2-3 add module + public import + @[expose] public section in batches (small dirs first, then Temporal+Bimodal). Phase 4 runs full lake build verification. Estimated 3 hours total.

artifacts.summary: Implementation plan for module keyword audit: 4 phases covering private removal, module migration by directory batch, and build verification
